name: BernieSanders.com
subject: We are stronger than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
With six wins in our last seven contests, when everything is tallied we'll have cut into Hillary Clinton's lead by about 20 percent.
Now we focus our attention on Wisconsin, a state Governor Scott Walker has turned into ground zero for the fight for workers' rights, women's rights, and voting rights. And a place where we are EXCRUCIATINGLY close to pulling off another shocking victory:
Emerson Poll in Wisconsin (3/20 to 3/22)
**Clinton:** 50%
**Sanders:** 44%
[**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 2016 today and we are going to shock the world -- once again -- in Wisconsin. And when we do, we'll be one step closer to victory in this primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s2-scoop "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s2-scoop")
You better believe the Clinton campaign wants to stop us right here, right now in Wisconsin.
Not many people expected us to respond to March 15th with a series of overwhelming victories. Most folks in the political establishment were hoping we'd go away.
But our campaign is still here, and we are stronger than ever. We're winning states, and we're winning delegates. If we keep it up, we can win this nomination. But that will require all of us standing together, especially ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline this week:
**Contribute $3 to Bernie 2016today, and we're going to win Wisconsin.**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/keep-up-the-momentum**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s2-scoop "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s2-scoop")
In every single state except Vermont, our campaign started way down in the polls. But once we've been able to get there and get organizing, we come back and either make it close, or we win. In Wisconsin, we're going to win.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s2-scoop "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/you-are-the-momentum?refcode=em160327s2-scoop")**

body:
Dear Patriot:

Imagine a U.S. Supreme Court rewriting our
Second Amendment out of existence.

Imagine a new tax-and-spend President roaring
into office ready to add trillions more to are already bloated
$19 TRILLION in debt.

Patriot, it's nightmare. And it's a
nightmare that very well could come true without your help today.

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to help my campaign reach
our $200,000 fundraising goal for this critical End of Quarter
Money Bomb?

Patriot, since my election to the U.S.
Senate, I've never once backed down to Big Government politicians
in EITHER party.

That's why Democrats have made me a top
target this election year.

They know, if they can take me out, it could
be smooth sailing for even more tax-and-spend boondoggles they're
sure to cook up.

My colleagues would simply roll over at the
first sign of a fight after seeing what happened to me.

You and I can't let that happen.

There's just to much on the line this
election year.

So please, if at all possible, agree to your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to help me
keep fighting for you in the U.S. Senate.

It's so critical we reach this $200,000
fundraising goal.

If we do, it'll show the tax-and-spenders our

So please be as generous as you can. And
please act right away!

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Alice Stewart
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Today Ted Cruz is
back on the trail in Wisconsin and meeting with people who
understand what good government reform does to boost jobs and
wages.

Under Governor Scott
Walker's leadership, the people of Wisconsin have seen the number
of individuals out of the work force - those who aren't even
looking for work - decrease by nearly half. Compare that to the
results of President Obama's agenda: in the same timeframe, the
number of people nationwide who are out of the workforce has
increased by 8 percent - that means even more people from coast
to coast have given up even looking for jobs.

But we know how to
change course - we enact a nationwide plan similar to Governor
Walker's. We lower taxes, break up the big business union bosses,
undo the job-crushing regulations, and let the people create new
jobs and build up their communities. We know what works; we just
need a president with the will to get it done - and Ted Cruz has
proven that he'll fight every day for working men and women so
that every family can achieve the American dream.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

name: John Kasich
subject: Off Limits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America
body:
Peter, over the weekend I was asked to comment on the recent
personal attacks that Trump and Cruz have been slinging at each
other and my answer was simple: Families should be off limits.

Enough is enough with the mud
slinging and the personal attacks. It's time to get serious and
select a Republican who can win in the fall.

With your help, not only will we
continue to deny Trump delegates, but we'll also head into the
convention with the momentum we'll need to win.

Wisconsin votes April 5, and then
we head into big races in New York on April 19 and across
Pennsylvania and the Mid-Atlantic on April 26. Chip in $25 or
more right now to support our critical grassroots programs.

>>Chip in $25<<

>>Chip in $50<<

>>Chip in $100<<

Six national polls have been
released last week that all show the same thing: I am the ONLY
Republican candidate who can defeat Hillary Clinton in the fall.

If we want to win the White House
and keep the majority in the U.S. Senate, we have to elect a
leader with a positive message for America's future, a
conservative record of accomplishment and the national security
experience to keep us safe.

Thank you for your support!

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate

JohnKasich.com

subject: momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

---
Friend --

I know you've heard a lot from us lately. In a race with stakes this high, we have to keep pushing. By now you probably know that the respected _Cook Political Report_ upgraded our Senate race from "Leans Republican" to "Toss Up!"

Pennsylvania's fate isn't the only thing up for grabs. **If we win, Democrats can take back the Senate.**

But we need to keep our momentum going strong into the primary -- and the only way to do that is to hit our ambitious end-of-quarter goal: 1,200 grassroots contributions from new donors before midnight Thursday.

Believe me, I know we ask for a lot, but **this is the most important deadline we 've ever faced. It's our last quarterly filing deadline before next month's primary, and all eyes are on us.**

[**Will you step up now to power our campaign at this most critical time? I 'd be so grateful for your support.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8120217843020070912/5908463226365935616?refcode=e20160328&refcode2=e20160328nd&amount=25)

The last few weeks have reaffirmed how significant our race is for Pennsylvania and for the country. Pat Toomey's obstructionism has reached new levels with his refusal to even _consider_ President Obama's nominee for the Supreme Court.

We can win the primary and be in a great position to defeat Toomey in November. I need your support for this final push, Friend.

[**Will you chip in now to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal? Every donor counts.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8120217843020070912/5908463226365935616?refcode=e20160328&refcode2=e20160328nd&amount=25)

Thanks for all that you do,

Katie

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Too late
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend -- tomorrow is too late. I emailed you two days ago...but now the situation is serious. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34449761:WHjZFfCN9:m:1:1104269936:4958E923BCD2443E2CA220C232A9CC49:r)
---
Friend -- **tomorrow is too late.**

I emailed you two days ago...but now the situation is serious.

As of right now, I am still well short of my FEC mandated End-of-Quarter deadline by more than four-hundred thousand dollars.

body:
Dear Patriot:

We reach our End of Quarter Money Bomb
deadline on Thurday.

That means we really have just 3 days to
prove to the Washington machine that we will not be silenced.

Can you contribute today to our End of
Quarter Money Bomb?

When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, the Big
Government "consensus" in Washington, D.C. was at its height.

Few members of either party dared to question
Washington, D.C.'s out-of-control spending. Or government spying.
Or the Federal Reserve's "print-now, ask-questions-later"
policies. Or our never-ending military interventions.

Knowing I would take on all of the madness,
the Big Government establishment of BOTH parties went all out to
defeat me. But with the help of patriots like you from all over
the country, I shocked the political world and won in 2010.

Since then, I have faced a lot of tough
decisions in the Senate, and I have continued to stand for our
freedoms.

Now, I need you to stand with me today --
will you decide to contribute $25 or $50 towards my End of
Quarter Money Bomb?

$10 MONEY BOMB >>

$25 MONEY BOMB >>

$50 MONEY BOMB >>

$100 MONEY BOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

The next few days will have an enormous
impact on this campaign.

So, I need to ask for your immediate
financial support.

My campaign is the target of liberals and
Washington establishment alike. They're coming after us this
cycle with everything they've got -- and you know why. It's
because I'm the one challenging politics as usual.

We've come a long way this week -- but with
the deadline just days away, I'm worried.

After the deadline on the 31st, the campaign
will have to file our financial reports with the FEC. Once my
report is made public, the liberal media will begin scouring
every line looking for weakness.

If we can meet our $200,000 Money Bomb goals,

establishment.

Can I count on you to stand with me today?

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: On to Wisconsin!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT [www
body:
Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451822:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r)
**Hello Friend,**
I hope you had a very happy Easter and were able to spend the holiday with your family, friends, and loved ones! I was especially glad to have the opportunity spend some quality time with Missy and our daughter, Remi, attending church, dyeing Easter eggs, and remembering the sacrifice Jesus Christ made on the cross so that we may enjoy the gift of everlasting life with our Father in Heaven. While we certainly face great trials in our nation today, they all pale in comparison to what our Savior endured for us -- and this yearly reminder helps put our worldly challenges in perspective.
Recent primary and caucus results -- with Ted winning over 69% of the vote in Utah, for example -- make it more clear than ever that this is a two person race between Ted Cruz and Donald Trump. And this makes for a very easy choice: Ted has spent a lifetime fighting for conservative principles. Donald, on the other hand, has [spent over four decades financing some of the most leftwing Democratic politicians in New York and the nation](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451823:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r):
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451823:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r)
Ted's and Donald's records couldn't be more different. That's why the choice facing primary voters across America is so important. And it's why the [April 5th primary in Wisconsin](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451824:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r) is so critical. Ted spent several days before Easter campaigning across the Badger State and he's returning today to meet more Wisconsinites. If you're in the area, **[click here to find an event near you](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451824:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r)**.
As part of our efforts in Wisconsin, we also recently opened another Camp Cruz, and volunteers from all across the country are already in place to help spearhead our efforts in the state. As you know, Camp Cruz was critical to our shocking victory in Iowa earlier this year -- **[and we'd love for you to be part of the team between now and April 5th](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451825:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r)**. Even if you are unable to travel to Wisconsin and join us at Camp Cruz, we can still use your help -- [click here to sign up here to make phone calls on behalf of the campaign from home](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451826:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r).
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451827:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r)
We've also launched three new TV ads in Wisconsin laying out Ted's bold, positive, optimistic agenda -- **[click here to watch them now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451828:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r)**.
Last week marked the [one year anniversary of launching this campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451829:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r), and I'm incredibly proud of what we've been able to accomplish together. We've had over 200,000 courageous conservatives [sign up to be part of the team as volunteers](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451830:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r), we have out-raised the entire Republican field thanks to [over a million contributions from all across the country](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451831:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r), and we have seen a diverse group of Republicans and conservative leaders like Mark Levin, Tony Perkins, Brent Bozell, Mike Lee, Carly Fiorina, Rick Perry, Lindsey Graham, Jeb Bush, _National Review_ , and the Club for Growth unite behind our campaign.
Despite another candidate's [choice to launch nasty, personal attacks](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34451832:W1NJsMCcN:m:1:1104269936:3D54FCE340328B16902841DF1DACD2E6:r) last week, our campaign has committed to focusing on the issues that matter to the American people: bringing back jobs, opportunity, and security to our great nation. And we are glad to have you as part of the effort to elect Ted Cruz as our next president and to bring back morning in America once again.
To victory,
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**

I was especially glad to have the opportunity spend some quality time with Missy and our daughter, Remi, attending church, dyeing Easter eggs, and remembering the sacrifice Jesus Christ made on the cross so that we may enjoy the gift of everlasting life with our Father in Heaven. As part of our efforts in Wisconsin, we also recently opened another Camp Cruz, and volunteers from all across the country are already in place to help spearhead our efforts in the state. As you know, Camp Cruz was critical to our shocking victory in Iowa earlier this year -- . Even if you are unable to travel to Wisconsin and join us at Camp Cruz, we can still use your help -- . body:
Saturday's results | Friend --

Our teams in Hawaii, Alaska, and Washington faced an uphill battle, and I am so grateful for everything they did. But after three losses on Saturday, our number one focus is now more important than ever: We must turn out folks in key states like Pennsylvania and New York so that we can finally secure the nomination.

In just three days, we face an important fundraising deadline. The resources we bring in before then will determine how strong we will be going into those primaries. **I need your help right now if we’re going to fund our organizing effort for these next states. Our campaign -- Heidi and I -- need you to keep us in this race.

The next few hours will be make-or-break for my run for the presidency.

So, I need to ask for your immediate financial support.

This election has taken its toll, and we've come a long way -- but my biggest deadline is approaching, and I need your help BEFORE I come up short.

After [March 31st,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34455739:WxdyCMCNf:m:1:1104269936:F14DDD2E5B4D6F7BE879C86A70DE925C:r) our campaign must file financial reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) detailing contributions and expenditures.

Once my report is made public, the liberal media will begin scouring every line looking for weakness.

Please don't let that happen. [**Make a contribution of $3 towards my EMERGENCY EOQ fund before it's too late.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34455739:WxdyCMCNf:m:1:1104269936:F14DDD2E5B4D6F7BE879C86A70DE925C:r)

Ted Cruz

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Political extremism in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When our campaign first set foot in Wisconsin this past summer, we got a very warm welcome from the people of Wisconsin. I spoke to more than 10,000 people in Madison about our corrupt political system, our broken economy, and how our political revolution can take back our country from people like the Koch Brothers in the billionaire class.
Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker and the Republican Party weren't as happy to see me. Governor Walker, who has been helped throughout his career by the Koch Brothers, issued statements against us, and **the GOP even put up billboards calling me an "extremist."**
Well, let's talk about extremism. Scott Walker has attacked the minimum wage, gutted unions, made it much harder to vote, and restricted access to abortion. **That is extremism.**
I can think of no better place for our political revolution to continue its momentum than in Wisconsin. The latest poll has us down just a few points, and I know that if we work together right now, we can pull off a huge victory.
**With a huge FEC fundraising deadlineon Thursday at midnight, there has not been a more important time for you to support our campaign.**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign now before Thursday night's deadline and we can shock the political establishment with a victory in Wisconsin.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full")**
Not only has Governor Walker been helped throughout his career by huge financial support from the Koch Brothers, but he has enacted their ideology while in office.
When you deny the right of workers to come together in collective bargaining, that's extremism.
When you tell a woman that she cannot control her own body, that's extremism.
When you give tax breaks to billionaires and refuse to raise the minimum wage, that's extremism.
Our views, which represent the views of the vast majority of the American people, are a little bit different. We believe that the time has come for the people of Wisconsin and all over the country to create a movement that tells the billionaire class: YOU CAN'T HAVE IT ALL!
And what we are saying to the Koch Brothers and Scott Walker is that this great country belongs to everybody, and not just a handful of very wealthy people.
[**Contribute $3 right now to say you stand with our political revolution and help us win in Wisconsin next week.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full")
When the people stand together against the Koch Brothers and the billionaire class, we can win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328v1-full")**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

Money talks in Washington, D.C.

And the Big Government politicians are
already sniffing around my campaign to see if you're still with
me.

Patriot, they'd love nothing more than to
write off our liberty movement.

If they succeed, there could be no stopping
their attacks on our Bill of Rights -- or their outlandish big
spending schemes.

That's why this End of Quarter Money Bomb is
so critical -- and why I'm counting on YOU to come through for me
with your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10
right away.

There's so much at stake in 2016.

And it's not "just" the race for the White
House.

The next confirmed Supreme Court Justice, new
spending schemes and the future fate of Obamacare will ALL likely
be decided in the Senate.

That's why my race is so important -- and why
members of BOTH parties have their eyes glued to my campaign's
End of Quarter Money Bomb.

As one of only a handful of U.S. Senators who
has dared to buck the status quo in Washington, D.C., my
colleagues know I'm now a top target for big spending Democrats.

That's why why they're so curious to see if
you still Stand With Rand.

After all -- whether it's filibustering
President Obama's lawless use of drones or forcing the entire
Senate on record on Audit the Fed -- everything I've accomplished
during my first term in the Senate has been because of you.

So I must ask you to please come through for
me once again.

Please don't let me down.

Please agree to your most generous
contribution right away!

In liberty,
Rand Paul

clean_body: | "" Friends, did you see Josh's email this morning? He's right -- with Rubio out and all the recent polls showing us up, we 're in a great position to win. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Why Wisconsin matters so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
You have to see this _Wall Street Journal_ headline from late last week:
_"Hillary Clinton Begins Shift to the General Election"_
Unfortunately for the Clinton campaign's plans, voters got in the way. We've won six of the last seven contests, and took 82% of the vote in Alaska, 73% in Washington, and 70% in Hawaii.
Here's the truth: the Clinton campaign and their allies in the financial and political establishment are desperately trying to write us off. **Their goal is to get you to stop fighting -- to stop volunteering, to stop donating -- because they know that if we continue to stand together, we can win.**
Now we have to focus on next Tuesday's primary in Wisconsin, another large state where we can do very well.
[**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline, and we are going to win Wisconsin and move one step close to the Democratic nomination.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328s2-e2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328s2-e2")
For the past several years, Wisconsin has been ground zero for worker's rights, women's rights, and voting rights. Those people cannot afford to wait for incremental change -- they need a president who will think big about the transformational change required of this moment. And that is what Bernie will deliver.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328s2-e2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-continue-our-momentum?refcode=em160328s2-e2")**

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
